title: crotalaria tomentosa
intro: Crotalaria tomentosa, also known as woolly rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a legume that is native to tropical Africa and Asia, and is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria tomentosa include its ability to treat skin conditions, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
